overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing the player character running through a grassy coastal area at night toward an illuminated structure labeled 'Animal Shelter'. The scene features a cool blue-green color palette with palm trees and futuristic industrial architecture visible in the distance.

agents.ego_description: running steadily across grassy terrain toward a distant illuminated structure carrying a large backpack with glowing blue elements

entered.detail: dark rocky outcrop with sparse vegetation lining the left side of the field
group of tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky on the right horizon
futuristic industrial building with bright lights and an elevated platform visible in the distance
tall thin structure with glowing lights extending into the night sky

segments.scene_description: The player character runs through an open grassy field at night, approaching a distant illuminated structure. Rocky outcrops line the left side while palm trees stand on the right, with a tall pylon tower visible in the far distance against the starry sky.

events.description: location discovery UI text 'Animal Shelter' appears at the top of the screen with Japanese subtitles

agents.ego_description: continuing to run toward the shelter as the location name appears on screen, maintaining steady pace across the uneven terrain

entered.detail: illuminated yellow shipping container situated near the shelter entrance

segments.scene_description: Continuing toward the Animal Shelter, the location name appears as on-screen text. The character gets closer to the industrial shelter structure and a yellow cargo container, with the surrounding palm trees and rocky terrain now passing by at close range as the destination approaches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a nocturnal coastal landscape that transitions from a wide open field toward a specific industrial destination. It begins with the player character running through a grassy expanse under a starry sky, flanked by rocky outcrops on the left and palm trees on the right with a distant pylon tower on the horizon. As the character advances, the environment tightens, and the on-screen text identifying the Animal Shelter appears to signal the approach. The scene then shifts from the open terrain to a close-range view of the destination, passing by the surrounding palms and rocks before arriving at the illuminated shelter structure and a yellow cargo container.
